bAzl6RH1PW95ZkFE.description: When you are hit with a melee attack, you may choose to destroy this weapon or armor to negate all damage from the attack.
bAzl6RH1PW95ZkFE.name: Sundering

Blowgun.description: Firing this weapon from hiding doesn't reveal your position.
Blowgun.name: Blowgun

Bolas.description: When you hit a legged creature the size of a horse or smaller, the target's speed is reduced to close until it frees itself ([[check 15 str]] or DEX check).
Bolas.name: Bolas

Breakable.description: This weapon breaks on a natural 1 attack roll.
Breakable.name: Breakable

Disadvantage/Stealth.description: You have disadvantage on stealth rolls when wearing this armor
Disadvantage/Stealth.name: Disadvantage/Stealth

Disadvantage/Swim.description: You have disadvantage on rolls related to swimming when wearing this armor
Disadvantage/Swim.name: Disadvantage/Swim

Finesse.description: You can use your Strength or Dexterity when attacking with this weapon
Finesse.name: Finesse

Lash.description: When you make a ranged attack with this weapon, it does not leave your grasp.
Lash.name: Lash

Loading.description: You must forgo moving to reload this weapon
Loading.name: Loading

No Swim.description: You are unable to swim when wearing this armor
No Swim.name: No Swim

Occupies One Hand.description: You can only use one hand when using this item
Occupies One Hand.name: Occupies One Hand

Op1yKvM7uq5pdopr.description: When you are hit with a melee attack, you may choose to destroy this weapon or armor to negate all damage from the attack.
Op1yKvM7uq5pdopr.name: Sundering

Returning.description: On a missed ranged attack, this weapon returns to the thrower.
Returning.name: Returning

Shuriken.description: Can be thrown into the ground. Living creatures who step on it take 1 damage and can only move at half speed for 10 rounds.
Shuriken.name: Shuriken

Thrown.description: You may throw this weapon to make a ranged attack with it using STR or DEX
Thrown.name: Thrown

Two-Handed.description: You must use this weapon with two hands
Two-Handed.name: Two-Handed

Versatile.description: You can use this weapon with one or two hands. Use the higher damage die if you’re wielding it with two
Versatile.name: Versatile
